---
title: "Client Report - Show me!"
subtitle: "Unit 4 Task 3"
author: "Ella Patten"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
    title-block-banner: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: body
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-copy: hover
    code-tools:
        source: false
        toggle: true
        caption: See code
execute: 
  warning: false
    
---


```{python}
import pandas
import polars as pl
import numpy as np
from lets_plot import *
LetsPlot.setup_html(isolated_frame=True)
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
import numpy 
from sklearn import metrics
df = pl.read_csv('dwellings_ml.txt')

feature_names = [
  'livearea','finbsmnt','basement','stories','nocars','numbdrm','numbaths','condition_AVG',
  'quality_A','quality_B','quality_C','quality_D','quality_X',
  'gartype_Att','gartype_Det','gartype_None','gartype_CP'
]

features = df.select(feature_names).to_numpy()
target = df.select('before1980').to_numpy().ravel()

x_train, x_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(features, target, test_size=0.34, random_state=76)

```
